description: Input schema for Kling Video v2.5 Turbo Text-to-Video.

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the video to generate.
examples: A golden retriever running through a sunlit meadow with butterflies.
prompt.title: Prompt

cfg_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values follow the prompt more strictly.
cfg_scale.title: Cfg Scale

aspect_ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the generated video.

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to guide what to avoid in generation.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds.

title: AppInput
